steps.title: Build the distance equation
steps.content:
Distance equals speed times time. The bus traveled at 55 mph for $x$ hours on the highway, covering $55x$ miles. On local roads, it traveled at 25 mph for $y$ hours, covering $25y$ miles. The total distance is 160 miles, so:
$$55x + 25y = 160$$

steps.title: Build the time equation and match the system
steps.content:
The bus traveled for a total of 4 hours: $x$ hours on the highway plus $y$ hours on local roads. This gives:
$$x + y = 4$$
The system of equations is $55x + 25y = 160$ and $x + y = 4$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
